description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard and landscaped with trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and large windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The front of the house includes a driveway leading to a garage, with a paved entryway and minimalistic landscaping. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, lounge area, and additional green space, ideal for outdoor activities. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of white and natural wood tones, contributing to the sleek, modern appearance. The layout is open and spacious, with clear separations between living, dining, and private areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a fenced yard and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: View from the backyard highlights the swimming pool, lounge area, and rear facade with large windows and patio access.
description_view_1: Side view shows the elongated layout, flat roof, and the relationship between the house, pool, and fenced yard.
description_view_2: Front view displays the driveway, garage, main entryway, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the full length of the house, garage, and additional green space at the rear.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, paved approach, and integrated garage door
